export class EquippedLoadoutParser{constructor(){this._weapon=null;this._shield=null;this._potion=null;}flush(){this._weapon=null;this._shield=null;this._potion=null;return true;}parse(wrapper){// Weapon
const hasWeapon=wrapper.readBoolean();if(hasWeapon){this._weapon={userId:wrapper.readInt(),itemId:wrapper.readInt(),name:wrapper.readString(),damage:wrapper.readInt(),icon:wrapper.readString()};}else{this._weapon=null;}// Shield
const hasShield=wrapper.readBoolean();if(hasShield){this._shield={userId:wrapper.readInt(),itemId:wrapper.readInt(),name:wrapper.readString(),defense:wrapper.readInt(),icon:wrapper.readString()};}else{this._shield=null;}// Potion
const hasPotion=wrapper.readBoolean();if(hasPotion){this._potion={userId:wrapper.readInt(),itemId:wrapper.readInt(),name:wrapper.readString(),type:wrapper.readString(),remaining:wrapper.readInt(),icon:wrapper.readString()};}else{this._potion=null;}return true;}get weapon(){return this._weapon;}get shield(){return this._shield;}get potion(){return this._potion;}}
